testcase.name: test_search_love_returns_songs

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_spotify_search_fix.py:18: in test_search_love_returns_songs assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_search_drake_returns_songs

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_search_returns_exactly_10_or_less
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_spotify_search_fix.py:53: in test_search_returns_exactly_10_or_less assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_search_empty_query_handling

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 assert 502 in [200, 422, 500] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_spotify_search_fix.py:64: in test_search_empty_query_handling assert response.status_code in [200, 422, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 422, 500] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
